creator: ak@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, Jens

Please remove PORTREVISION and fix plist:
===>  Building package for rodent-4.8.0
Deleting rodent-4.8.0
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/share/icons/Rodent/icon-theme.cache' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/share/doc/rodent/RTFM.pdf' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package `rodent-4.8.0'
(perhaps the packing list is incorrectly specified?)
================================================================

=== Checking filesystem state

-- 
Alex
